list.name: Rahul Verma
list.text: Got a premium Samsung TV at 40% off. The quality is indistinguishable from new. Highly impressed with the service!

list.name: Sneha Kapoor
list.text: I recommend Green Nest to all my clients looking for high-end appliances on a budget. Their refrigerators are top-notch.

list.name: Amit Patel
list.text: The 40-point quality check is no joke. Every appliance I've seen here is in excellent functional condition.
